package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for middleware_uses_global_logger_or_config_singleton: Middleware that depends on mutable globals instead of injected config and logger instances.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule092NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule092NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule092NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario092Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule092NegativeService, input Rule092NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
